name: Markdown Image in Form
summary: Display an image inside a form using markdown HelpContent with `![alt](url)` syntax
whenToUse: Showing a diagram, workflow illustration, or reference image
Visual instructions that complement text guidance
Displaying logos, charts, or sample documents

help: The diagram above shows the steps in the application process.

notes: Use standard markdown image syntax: `![alt text](image-url)`
Set `options.markdown` to `true` to enable markdown rendering
Always provide descriptive alt text for screen reader accessibility
The image URL must be a fully qualified public URL
The old `variant: img` approach is deprecated — always use markdown images
